untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options pricing calculations (implied volatility, near-term and longer-term call prices, theoretical vs actual differential comparison) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. These are derivatives pricing operations that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_213 is an options strategy signal involving calendar spreads and implied volatility analysis. The core logic (buying when theoretical differential > actual differential) requires options pricing models and IV calculations that fall outside the scope of price-action and technical indicators. A placeholder entry condition using volatility and a reversal-based exit were substituted, but this is NOT a valid translation of the original signal.
